text:
A message to Norfolk ahead of tomorrow’s Police and Crime Commissioner election - Restore Britain is on the ballot, and we are offering something entirely different. We have devised a 140 page policy plan on how to Restore British Policing - what needs to be done, how it can be done, on a timetable with a concise step-by-step plan on exactly what we will do.

No other political party has put in this level of effort - they just turn up with colourful leaflets and a few bullet points about how they can fix it all overnight. No plan, just empty promises.

Restore Britain is doing things differently.

Here are the main points from our policing policy.

- Introduce a new Police Restoration Act
- Restore the Office of Constable
- Restore the Constable's Oath
- Enforce one law for everyone
- Remove politics from policing
- End ideological and DEI policing
- Protect operational independence
- Introduce Police Accountability Boards
- Rebuild police training colleges
- Enforce merit-based recruitment with tougher vetting and fitness standards
- Restore frontline policing
- Restore neighbourhood beat policing
- Restore criminal intelligence
- Refocus the National Crime Agency on serious crime
- Bring custody and forensics back under police control
- Strengthen public order policing
- Create a reserve police force
- Focus on keeping the peace, preventing crime and bringing offenders to justice, not box ticking

This is all outlined over our 140 page policy plan - exactly how we intend to achieve it.

Mark Buckton, our candidate tomorrow, is a farmer, a veteran and a Norfolk family man.

As Norfolk’s Police and Crime Commissioner, he will use every tool at this disposal to enact our plan at a county-level.

Proving that common sense, no-nonsense policing is exactly what people want.

If you agree, then I hope you will vote for Restore Britain and Mark Buckton tomorrow.

Norfolk. A proper county, with proper people - I absolutely love representing so many of the good men and women of Norfolk in Parliament. As many of you know, there is an election in our county on July 16th. For Police and Crime Commissioner. I am urging Norfolk patriots to use this election as a way to voice your discontent about how Norfolk has been policed, but also more widely used as a dumping ground by the Westminster establishment.

Towns across Norfolk are having unvetted illegal men from backward third world countries forced into their communities. Thetford. Norwich. All over. I am sick of it. We’re all sick of it. Why should this peaceful corner of England be invaded by scumbags who have broken into our country?

Voting Restore Britain next Thursday will not deport these men, sadly. That will have to wait. I'm just being honest. But it will send a message. We do not want these men in our county.

A Restore Britain Police and Crime Commissioner for Norfolk will ensure that police resource is appropriately deploy to any areas where these men are accommodated. 

We will not allow local children and women to be abused and harassed - it will not be tolerated, and the full force of Norfolk police will be used to crack down on ANY criminal activity by these men.

Not only that, we have committed to using all powers available to the office to cleaning up our high streets - in Great Yarmouth, Norwich, King’s Lynn, Gorleston, Thetford, Wymondham, Cromer, Swaffham, Dereham, Downham Market and everywhere else.

That means cracking down on vape shops, Turkish barbers and all the other obvious money-laundering fronts that are plaguing our town centres.

It’s obviously criminal activity, yet nobody will call it out.

Restore Britain will. I promise you that.

We will brutally clamp down on anti-social behaviour, shoplifting, graffiti, littering and more.

Prioritising the safety of women and girls through visible patrols and tougher action against violent and sexual offenders - pushing for deportations at any opportunity. 

We have committed to holding a women’s safety summit in every part of Norfolk so that local women can have a platform to voice their concerns. I did one in Great Yarmouth, with ongoing success. We will replicate that across Norfolk.

Let’s take some pride in Norfolk again. That means taking back our high streets. That means visible policing. That means the police taking a no-nonsense approach to deal with blatant criminals.

For too long, Norfolk’s police leadership have sat back and watched the county decay. I am so very tired of it.

Our candidate, Mark Buckton, is the man to reverse that.

A veteran. A farmer. A Norfolk family man.

He has the experience and the courage to hold the police to account. We do not need the police marking their own homework. That will solve nothing. We need an entirely fresh start. That is the only way to inject new ideas and a totally different approach.

If you agree with what I’m saying, then vote for it. 

Vote Restore Britain on July 16th.

Clean up Norfolk, make our streets safe again and send a message to Westminster it cannot ignore. 

Restore Britain.

Restore Britain is giving them that democratic choice on July 16th.

My message to them…

If you want a city-wide police effort to close down the money-laundering vape shops and Turkish barbers, then vote for it.

If you want zero-tolerance on anti-social behaviour and gangs of aggressive men who make Norwich women feel so very uncomfortable, then vote for it. 

If you want the police to put law-abiding British citizens ahead of foreign nationals who should never have been in our country to begin with, then vote for it.

If you want a genuine visible policing effort across the city, in the centre and the suburbs, then vote for it.

If you want scumbag shoplifters treated like the criminals they are, then vote for it.

If you want HMO crime in Norwich to be properly policed without fear, then vote for it.

If you want homeless men living in tents around the city moved on, then vote for it.

If you want a women's safety summit, to listen to concerns of local Norwich women with nothing off-limits, then vote for it. 

If you want the police to take grooming/rape gangs seriously in Norwich, because they are operating all over the city, then vote for it. 

Vote Restore Britain.

Our Norfolk Police and Crime Commissioner candidate is Mark Buckton.

A veteran, a farmer, a Norfolk family man.

We cannot have the police marking their own homework.

Mark will hold the police to account, in Norwich and across Norfolk. 

Norwich is a proper city filled with proper patriots. 

I hope you will consider showing the country that through voting for Restore Britain in the Norfolk Police and Crime Commissioner election on July 16th.

Ahead of the Norfolk Police and Crime Commissioner by-election on July 16th, Restore Britain has released our 140 page plan on how to restore British policing. 

We have done our homework. We have put the effort in. We have presented our plan.

It’s easy to say policing needs reform and it needs to change. We know that. It is MUCH harder to actually present what needs to be done, by who, how, why and when. That is what we have done.

Here are the key points…

- Introduce a new Police Restoration Act
- Restore the Office of Constable
- Restore the Constable's Oath
- Enforce one law for everyone
- Remove politics from policing
- End ideological and DEI policing
- Protect operational independence
- Introduce Police Accountability Boards
- Rebuild police training colleges
- Enforce merit-based recruitment with tougher vetting and fitness standards
- Restore frontline policing
- Restore neighbourhood beat policing
- Restore criminal intelligence
- Refocus the National Crime Agency on serious crime
- Bring custody and forensics back under police control
- Strengthen public order policing
- Create a reserve police force
- Focus on keeping the peace, preventing crime and bringing offenders to justice, not box ticking

We have laid out exactly what needs to be done and how we would do it. 140 pages. 

Unusual, for a political party I know.

We have presented a serious plan, and we intend to implement it.

If you’re in Norfolk, then you can vote for it. Follow Restore Britain Norfolk to keep up to date with our campaign. 

Vote Mark Buckton - a veteran and a farmer.

Vote Restore Britain on July 16th.

Restore Britain stands with the people of Thetford against this dumping of third world migrants into their peaceful community. A Restore Britain Norfolk Police and Crime Commissioner will act to protect local women and children from these scumbags.

Mark Buckton is our Restore Britain candidate for the Norfolk Police and Crime Commissioner by-election.

A Norfolk veteran, farmer and family man.

He began his career serving as an officer in the Royal Armoured Corps, including a tour supporting the Police Service of Northern Ireland. His years in the British Army instilled the values of discipline, leadership, duty and personal responsibility.

This is exactly what Norfolk needs.

Since leaving the military, Mark has built an impressive career - helping people into work and supporting local industry. Proper real world experience to bring into the Norfolk police.

He has also served as a college governor, a school careers ambassador and a youth rugby coach - helping young men and women across Norfolk build skills for life. 

Mark is rooted in rural Norfolk - he understands the realities of countryside life, the pressures facing farmers and land managers, and the importance of protecting both our rural economy and our natural environment. 

A good man who is ready to serve the people of Norfolk.

I have every confidence that Mark will bring some desperately needed integrity, competence and determination to the role.

I hope you will join me in supporting Mark's campaign to make Norfolk safe again.

If you're in Norfolk, please follow Restore Britain Norfolk to keep up to date with the campaign.

The British people are sick of being let down by an endless merry go round of Prime Ministers while nothing really changes for them.

Whoever becomes Prime Minister needs to drop the caution and complacency and show the ambition our country deserves.

That means tackling the cost of living with a bold new deal with Europe, fixing social care to end the NHS crisis and giving power back to communities through a fair voting system.
We can’t risk Reform’s division in our communities. Vote Labour on Thursday 30 July.

I am delighted to announce Marlon Scott West as Restore Britain’s candidate for the Greater Manchester mayoral by-election.

West is one of the most prominent campaigners against the rape gangs in the country - he spent more than two years forcing the government to establish a national rape gang inquiry, meeting repeatedly with senior politicians, including safeguarding minister Jess Phillips, and publicly accusing Labour of breaking its promises to victims and families when they stalled.

Marlon’s own daughter was groomed and raped. He understands the evil, and wants to use his experience to ensure that others avoid the same fate.

I have such enormous respect for that. 

Marlon played a central role in our independent Rape Gang Inquiry, working alongside Sammy Woodhouse to gather evidence and support survivors throughout the process. The inquiry's report, published this month, is the most comprehensive and honest independent examination of rape gang abuse ever conducted in Britain.

Marlon is born and bred in Greater Manchester and has worked in the NHS across the region for over 30 years.

He is standing on a broader platform for the city he has spent his life in. He will push to attract genuine business investment, cut wasteful public spending including on the GMCA's own bloated administration, protect greenfield land from developers, and overhaul a transport network that has failed commuters for years.

Greater Manchester is not a backdrop for Marlon.

It is where his family was failed. Scarlett was groomed by gangs operating across the region while Andy Burnham ran the city.

Marlon spent years fighting the institutions that looked the other way - he is now asking Greater Manchester voters for the chance to run those same institutions.

I will do everything in my power to back and support Marlon.

A good man who wants a better future for his home.

Please follow Restore Britain Greater Manchester to keep up to date with our campaign.

text: Vote Green this Thursday💚 Vote Green this Thursday💚 Vote Green this Thursday💚 Vote Green this Thursday💚

The men and women of Ashton, Hindley, Winstanley, Orrell, Abram, Worsley Mesnes, Bryn, Hindley Green, Platt Bridge and everywhere else across Makerfield have been ignored for decades. Literally decades.

And then what happens? Some random Labour MP resigns to let his mate have a run at the seat so that he can get into Downing Street.

You have been flooded with arrogant Londoners telling you how to vote - pretending to be local, pretending to understand what you are going through. 

They don’t know, and to be honest - they don’t care.

ALL they are interested in is your vote.

This will finish tomorrow, and they’ll all disappear. You’ll never see them again.

That’s just the truth.

From the start, Restore Britain has been honest. We have not patronised you. Your vote is your vote, use it how you see fit.

If that’s for Restore Britain? Then, great. Thanks. If not, fine. We’re not going to beg for it.

But the choice has been pretty appalling. 

Reform, Labour. Both telling you not to vote for the other one because they’re a bit less shit.

Is this really the best they can do? 

Reform’s entire campaign has been based around the entire snotty establishment telling you not to vote for Restore Britain. That is it. No vision, no issues, nothing. Isn’t it boring?

Honestly, Reform is just a rehashed version of the Conservative Party. Same people, same failures.

Jenrick, Braverman, Nadine Dorries, Zahawi - all leading Reform. Do you really want to endorse these people? Give them a second chance?

These Reform politicians imported millions of third world migrants into Britain. I will not forget that. I will certainly not forgive them. 

Restore Britain has put forward a mix of local and national issues - not making promises we cannot keep locally, and laying out a number of concrete pledges that Rebecca will work towards if elected - on apprenticeships, women’s safety, rejuvenating your high streets, fighting overdevelopment and more. 

Boring politics maybe, but these are the issues that affect your lives.

And yes - we have made our national platform clear. Removing millions of foreigners who should not be here, reversing mass immigration, brutally slashing tax, real deterrent for the most awful crime (the death penalty), overhauling welfare to benefit those actually contributing, fighting the relentless islamification of Britain and so much more.

But I’ll end with this. An honest message from a politician. 

Whatever happens today, there WILL be a Labour Government. Nothing will change that. Reform, Restore Britain or Labour winning. There will be a Labour Government. 

You have a golden opportunity to send the entire rotten establishment a shock that it will never forget. The biggest shock. 

How?

Vote Restore Britain.

I hope you find the courage to take that opportunity. 

Thanks for your time as always,

Rupert Lowe
Farage promised a rape gang inquiry. He failed, he lied. He broke that promise. Rupert Lowe kept his promise. That is leadership.

Essentially what has happened is that the decaying political establishment has imported millions of migrants from alien cultures that are entirely incompatible with the British way of life.

Those migrants have colonised large parts of our country, and live their lives how they choose to do so because our authorities are too frightened of being called racist to challenge them.

That has meant attitudes have flourished and spread which, in short, treat women and non-Muslims like shit.

And yes, I do mean that.

Conservative, Labour and Reform politicians are all directly responsible for this vast importation. Personally, I will never forgive anyone responsible. 

Vulnerable working class white girls were treated like a piece of meat. Raped, abused, tortured, murdered. It was a racial attack, and it was a coordinated attack. All across Britain.

They targeted these girls because they were vulnerable, they were young, they were white.

Until the political class accepts that fact, nothing will EVER change.

These men do not live by the same rules as us - it is all beyond evil. And this is a coordinated network of organised crime right across the country. It is not random groups of scumbags doing this. It is a network. Organised. Ruthless. Efficient. It is an industry.

This is not homegrown. We imported it. We welcomed it. Embraced it. We continue to do so.

That was a choice.

Reversing it is also a choice. One we will make.

A Restore Britain Government will remove millions of foreign nationals who hate our way of life and have no reason to be in our country. Gone, and never allowed back.

With the British people’s approval, we will reintroduce the death penalty.

If a Pakistani man has been gang-raping a young English girl? Torturing her? Passing her around his brothers to also be raped?

We will put him to death. And I look forward to that. I really do.

Our report has outlined exact recommendations on what needs to be done to eradicate this cancer.

A Restore Britain Government will deliver it.

We will use the full force of the British state to crack down on these rapists and their enablers in the most brutal fashion imaginable. It will be swift and ruthless. It will be done, finally.

And I include their enablers in that.

That is why Farage tried to put me in prison. Because I wanted to deport complicit foreign family members. He found that so very extreme - admitting it on national television. Simply remarkable.

Hearing the evidence and testimonies provided to our inquiry, I can assure you that I am holding a moderate position.

I want the scumbags gone. Deported. Never allowed back.

For the very worst among them, I want them permanently removed.

Restore Britain will get called extreme, racist, islamophobic and whatever else by the Guardian, Farage, Nadine Dorries, the BBC, the Daily Mail, Zack Polanski.

I do not give a shit.

I am just grateful that there is finally a political party with the courage to do what needs to be done.

We are going to get our country back.

We are going to Restore Britain.

Whilst nothing is done, it worsens each and every day. There are entire streets of people that are almost incapable of speaking English. They live parallel lives, with parallel laws. A vast proportion do not work, a vast proportion claim benefits, a vast proportion live in social housing.

Look at parts of Manchester. It is outrageous that this has been allowed to happen. By Labour, Reform, and Conservative politicians - they imported them, they allowed our communities to be so heavily transformed without our consent. 

It would be utterly naive to even label this as multiculturalism, because it isn’t. There is often only one culture, and one religion.

Islam.

Often there is no integration. There is never any chance of integration. It is all about Islam, and the places have been entirely transformed because of that. 

No other MP or political party will even discuss it. Reform? No chance. Farage doesn't want to 'alienate' Islam. His words. The Tories? They were largely responsible. Labour? Don't make me laugh. 

Something has to be done. And there is now a political party that will do something - Restore Britain.

Bradford, Luton, East London, Rochdale, Birmingham, Blackburn, Leicester, Bolton. Vast swathes of Manchester. 

Look at what has happened there. And it will happen elsewhere too. 

They have all changed in ways, so rapidly, that NOBODY consented to. In fact, the British people voted against it again and again and again. These politicians forced it on you all regardless.

This transformation happened there, and with birthrates as they are alongside brutal mass immigration, it will happen elsewhere too. It will happen in Ashton, Hindley, Winstanley, Orrell, Abram, Worsley Mesnes, Bryn, Hindley Green, Platt Bridge and everywhere else across Makerfield too.

I’m 68. I am not worried about my future. I am worried about my children’s future, the future for their children. I am worried about your children's future. I am worried about the future for everybody’s children.

I get abused for even daring to talk about this. Daily Mail front pages, endless attacks, Reform UK insults. It will not stop. I do not care. 

I do not feel afraid. And nor should you. If enough of us come together and draw a deep line in the sand, we can fix this. We can restore Britain.

I am no longer just talking about this. We are now offering an answer. A democratic route out.

This is why the patriotic people of Makerfield must vote Restore Britain. 

We will do what is necessary. Halt immigration from these countries, deport millions and ensure that we look after our own people before anyone else. 

Draw that line in the sand. Find the courage to vote for what you believe in. Take the first step in how to get our country back.

Vote Restore Britain.

Restore Britain has been labelled as ‘extremist’ by Zack Polanski, ‘racist’ by endless Labour MPs, ‘repulsive’ by Jeremy Corbyn and ‘neo-nazis’ by Reform.

Our immigration policy has certainly ruffled a few feathers. Take a read, and let me know if you think it’s as unacceptable as the British establishment wants you to believe...

Step number one, straightforward.

Illegal migrants gone. Every man, woman and child. Deported. I don’t care about the consequences. This is the most pressing issue, and a Restore Britain Government will tackle it with the enthusiasm it deserves.

We are the only party to lay out in excruciating detail exactly how we do it. 110+ policy pages of pure deportation joy. 

Mass deportations. Real mass deportations. And we mean it. 

Step two? Legal immigration.

Criminal migrants? Don’t even need to discuss. Gone. Day one. 

If a migrant living in Britain can’t speak English, we will deport them. 

How on earth can they contribute when they can’t speak English. They can’t, so they will be removed.

The only foreign language translation a Restore Britain Government will provide is the seatbelt instructions on their flight home.

Foreign nationals living in social housing? We will deport them.

British social housing should be for British families. Evidently, they can’t financially support themselves so they will be removed.

There is a pattern here.

If a foreign national is claiming benefits, they too will be removed. 

Pay your way, and then some, or you will be sent packing. 

Foreign Islamists spreading hate? We will remove them. Gladly. Those mosques found to be harbouring these extremists will be shut down, and those foreign nationals enabling it will also be removed.

And of course, moving on to the reason Farage tried to put me in prison. Because he thought my position was so very extreme...

If a Pakistani wife is aware that her husband has been gang-raping English children but fails to report it? She will be deported back to Pakistan. I hope her husband isn’t as fortunate. 

Dual nationals involved in this filth will have their British citizenship stripped, and they will be removed.

Incoming immigration.

There will be significant net negative immigration - FAR more will leave than arrive. FAR more. Those who do will contribute and integrate, providing high skills. Spouses of British men and women from non-red list countries will be welcome - that is positive immigration and should be encouraged.

A Restore Britain Government will end immigration from Red List countries.

Somalia, Sudan, Pakistan, Eritrea. A full list is being drafted.

We will discriminate. 

Immigration from Sudan is not the same as immigration from Australia.

OBVIOUSLY.

We will get called racist for saying that, but honestly I could not care less anymore. 

Restore Britain is willing to do what needs to be done.

We will implement an immigration system that puts one group of people first. 

The British people.

That is what a Restore Britain Government will do. 

If you agree, then vote for it.

Vote Restore Britain.
